response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience, deep technical versatility across languages including Python, JavaScript, and D, and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or enterprise-scale feature flagging infrastructure required for the Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and systems-level languages like D and C++
Proven ability to build and lead open-source platforms (GISCollective) with real-world adoption
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through workshops, mentoring, and cross-team tooling contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into large-scale telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or AI-augmented engineering workflows
Lacks documented experience leading multi-team initiatives in enterprise AI/cloud environments
